Cottage kitchen with bundles of sage, rosemary, lavender hanging from dark rafters, iron cauldron bubbling softly.
Overgrown herb garden behind weathered stone cottage, winding paths edged with fragrant lavender and creeping thyme.
Cool root cellar lined with rows of labeled glass jars: preserved mushrooms, tinctures, dried petals.
Cottage doorstep at misty dawn, dew-wet garden beyond, tortoiseshell cat curled on worn threshold stone.
Workshop table scattered with brass mortar, dried rose petals, melted candle stubs, leather-bound grimoire splayed open.
Forest clearing holds moss-roofed stone cottage, thin woodsmoke curling from crooked chimney into morning air.
Wide windowsill crowded with potted mint, rose quartz crystals, amber bottles glowing in afternoon sunlight.
Walled garden with espaliered apple trees, humming beehives, ancient stone well draped in climbing ivy.
Pantry shelves stacked floor to ceiling: golden honey jars, herb-infused oils, bundles of gnarled roots.
Firelit cottage interior, flames casting dancing shadows across walls thick with hanging dried herb bundles.
Outdoor work table beneath wisteria-draped pergola, granite mortar grinding fresh-picked feverfew and chamomile flowers.
Narrow forest path leads to cottage half-hidden behind wild roses, blackberry brambles, tangled honeysuckle vines.
Kitchen hearth with copper pots, cast-iron kettle steaming, bunches of dill hanging above crackling fire.
Garden gate opening to rows of medicinal herbs: foxglove, comfrey, yarrow, bordered by white stones.
Cottage loft with rafters festooned in drying garlic braids, chili peppers, bundles of wheat and marigolds.
Sunlit corner with spinning wheel, basket of carded wool dyed with indigo, madder root, weld.
Stone cottage surrounded by wildflower meadow, bee skeps under oak trees, worn path to forest edge.
Candlelit workroom with distillation apparatus, glass alembic, copper coils, collecting fragrant hydrosol in vials.
Cottage porch with rocking chair, mortar of elderflowers, view of vegetable garden and distant misty hills.
Kitchen table piled with freshly harvested nettles, dandelion roots, burdock, waiting to be processed and preserved.
Greenhouse attached to cottage, glass panes fogged, shelves of propagating cuttings, soil-stained wooden benches.
Cellar stairs descending to mushroom-growing chamber, logs sprouting oyster mushrooms, earthy cool darkness below.
Cottage bedroom with dried lavender beneath pillows, dream sachets hanging from bedposts, moonlight through curtains.
Outdoor clay oven beside herb spiral garden, bread baking, rosemary branches smoking on hot stones.
Writing desk by window overlooking garden, quill and ink, pressed flowers between pages of handwritten herbarium.
